name: Moslem-Style Pot Stickers
recipeIngredient: Package of gyoza skins, cut into desired size.
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the prepared dough on a floured surface and roll out until thin.
2. Cut each sheet into squares large enough to hold your filling.
3. Spoon a small amount of filling onto one-third of each square.
4. Fold the sides over the filling, pressing firmly around the edges to seal.
5. Seal by folding the remaining side over itself.
6. Gently press any stray dough pieces off the surface with a fork.
7. Place on a parchment-lined tray and steam until cooked through.
